_comment: Apify 'Google Maps Scraper' actor (compass/crawler-google-places). SOLO-TRACK TEMPLATE — fill in after Will + Elena pick top 2-3 Zone of Genius sectors. Replace the searchStringsArray entries below with sector-specific terms across the 8 Phoenix metro cities. See context/sector-evaluation-framework.md for the picking exercise.
_sector_pick_status: OPEN — need Will + Elena 30-min Zone of Genius re-read to narrow
_to_use: Once sector picked: (1) take 3-5 best search terms for that sector, (2) cross with 8 cities = 24-40 search strings, (3) paste into searchStringsArray below, (4) strip the underscore-prefixed comment keys (Apify ignores them but cleaner), (5) run.
searchStringsArray: FILL THIS IN AFTER SECTOR PICK — see _to_use note above
_field_note: scrapeContacts pulls emails + socials from each place's website (extra credits but worth it for outreach). Set to false to save credits if you only want phone/website. scrapePlaceDetailPage must stay true to get website/phone/category reliably.
_solo_track_deal_box: Target $300-500k purchase price. SDE floor ~$253k at $300k → ~$286k at $500k. Revenue floor ~$843k-$952k at 30% margin. Smaller deal than Dan track ($500k-$1M) because no Dan CPA cover + simpler operationally. See context/acquisition.md for full deal box.
